allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "D:\\Projects\\weddsite\\Client Websites\\Premium Client Websites\\salome\\" | Where-Object { $_.Extension -match 'jpg|jpeg' } | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell($f = Get-Item "D:\\Projects\\weddsite\\Client Websites\\Premium Client Websites\\salome\\finale.mp4"; "{0:N2} MB" -f \($f.Length/1MB\); $w = Get-Item "D:\\Projects\\weddsite\\Client Websites\\Premium Client Websites\\salome\\finale.webm"; "webm: {0:N2} MB" -f \($w.Length/1MB\))
PowerShell($c = Get-Command ffmpeg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.Source } else { "ffmpeg NOT found" })

PowerShell($dir = "D:\\Projects\\weddsite\\Client Websites\\Premium Client Websites\\salome"; & ffmpeg -y -i "$dir\\finale.webm" -c:v libx264 -profile:v high -pix_fmt yuv420p -crf 23 -preset slow -an -movflags +faststart "$dir\\finale.mp4"; "exit=$LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell($f = Get-Item "D:\\Projects\\weddsite\\Client Websites\\Premium Client Websites\\salome\\finale.mp4"; "mp4: {0:N2} MB" -f \($f.Length/1MB\))

PowerShell($dir = "D:\\Projects\\weddsite\\Client Websites\\Premium Client Websites\\salome"; foreach \($n in 1,2\) { & ffmpeg -y -i "$dir\\$n.webm" -c:v libx264 -profile:v high -pix_fmt yuv420p -crf 23 -preset slow -an -movflags +faststart "$dir\\$n.mp4"; "$n exit=$LASTEXITCODE" })
